name: nodecast-tv
longDescription:
nodecast-tv is a modern, self-hosted web IPTV player supporting Live TV, EPG, Movies (VOD), and Series. Built for performance and large libraries (7000+ channels).

Features include fast channel zapping, an interactive 24h EPG grid guide with search, dedicated Movies and Series sections with rich metadata and posters, a unified favorites system with instant sync, and user authentication with admin/viewer roles plus optional OIDC SSO (Authentik, Keycloak, etc.).

Supports Xtream Codes and M3U playlists. Hardware-accelerated transcoding via NVIDIA NVENC, AMD AMF, Intel QuickSync, and VAAPI, with smart codec detection and remux/transcode decisions plus 5.1→Stereo downmix presets.
description: A modern, self-hosted web IPTV player with Live TV, EPG, VOD, Series, auth, and hardware transcoding.
